title: agrostis alba subsp. pauciflora
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. pauciflora, also known as slender bent or lowland bent grass, is a subspecies of the Agrostis alba species, characterized by its slender stems and sparse flowering habit. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subsp. pauciflora include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
